name: Strip Empty SMTP Config
description: Zitadel-specific: removes the ZITADEL_DEFAULTINSTANCE_SMTPCONFIGURATION_* block from the compose when SMTP_PASSWORD is empty. Zitadel's FirstInstance migration rejects partial/blank SMTP config, so those env vars must be absent (not just empty) for SMTP setup to be skipped.

parameters.name: SMTP Password
parameters.description: SMTP provider password (from oidc stack). Empty value triggers removal of the SMTP block from the rendered compose.
